---
title: "[R is for <br>Authoring!!]{.shadowsharp}" 
author: 'OOH Session #120...<br>[Zotero!!]{.zoterotit}'
title-slide-attributes: 
  data-background-image: ../../../img/zorro.png  #https://m.media-amazon.com/images/S/pv-target-images/bf4e67b54f0ae4a7d090d9141d23be078eecbeb20a99d523f67c13d5e63f3c8c._SX1080_FMjpg_.jpg   
#  data-background-opacity: ".4"
format: 
  revealjs:
    mouse-wheel: true              
    slide-tone: false
    transition: convex
    transition-speed: slow
    code-overflow: wrap              ## has never "worked"
    theme: ../../../css/theming2026.scss 
    logo: https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/599c8ee149fc2bd3b045f4d2/1543517888687-LXFVC2MA16UNCIRFOSNG/587b4fb344060909aa603a75.png  #https://www.pngplay.com/wp-content/uploads/14/Pink-Panther-Thinking-Transparent-Images.png
    footer-logo-link: "https://github.com/jtkulas/LiveStreams"  ## https://github.com/shafayetShafee/reveal-header#readme
    preview-links: false      ## true brings up iframe window instead of "site"
    code-annotations: hover   ## select
engine: knitr                 ## not picking up inline codes
filters: 
  - reveal-header
execute: 
  eval: false       ## for fenced code 
  echo: true
---

## Open Office Hours <br>(`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) 

::: {layout="[[10,10],]"}
::: first-column
+ Recap session #119
+ Today's topic(s):
    + [[Zotero!!]{.zotero .Bigger}](https://quarto.org/docs/visual-editor/technical.html#citations)
+ Shared problem-solving

::: aside

\* ...also please [check out the awesome artwork](https://x.com/tokuyaartist/status/1580665323908321280?s=20) of Tőkű Mőriya {{< iconify noto-v1:artist-palette >}}

:::

:::

::: second-column

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

::: {.callout-note}
## Reminder -- check it out!! {{< iconify emojione-v1:blue-book >}}{{< iconify emojione-v1:green-book >}}
Fantastic [{{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} resource!! ](https://qmd4sci.njtierney.com/) 
:::

:::

:::

::: {.absolute style="top: 185px; right: -120px; width:550px;"}
<a href="https://jtkulas.github.io/LiveStreams/slides/2026/3_3_26">
  <img src="/img/title119.JPG">
</a>
:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/015/241/249/non_2x/glowing-neon-arrow-doodle-transparent-free-png.png){.absolute top="165" left="385" width="200"}

# Recap of Session <br>#119: 

![](https://pngimg.com/d/sticky_note_PNG18952.png){.absolute right="50" top="200"}

![](https://freepngimg.com/download/icon/file/10375-yaml-file-format.png){.absolute width="170" top="245" right="80"}

## [[YAML]{.ranchers2 .bigger}](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/front-matter.html) [[(YAML Ain't Markup Language...)]{.ranchers2 .smaller}](https://github.com/yaml/)

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Whazzat?!?

aka "front matter" -- controls overall ***look***, ***feel***, & ***format*** of your rendered product (plain text within the body of your product typically doesn't differentiate -- [YAML]{.ranchers2} is where you differentiate)

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%" .smaller}

>3 [types]{.underline} of content within these {{< iconify material-icon-theme:quarto >}} & {{< iconify file-icons:rmarkdown style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} products:

:::

::: {.column width="3%"}
:::

::: {.column width="19%"}

<br>

{{< iconify mdi:number-2-box style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} text {{< iconify emojione:writing-hand-medium-light-skin-tone >}}

:::

::: {.column width="19%"}
{{< iconify mdi:number-1-box style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} [YAML]{.ranchers2} {{< iconify streamline-ultimate-color:hierarchy-5 >}}
:::

::: {.column width="19%"}

<br>

{{< iconify mdi:number-3-box style="color:#82b1ff;" >}} code {{< iconify devicon:r >}}

:::

:::

### Simple [YAML]{.ranchers2}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

Parallels product specification: <br>
<br>
simpler = less formatting restrictions (generally being ok with `default` appearance)

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

```{r}
---
title: "Untitled"
format: revealjs #<1>
---

# Header
  
lorem ipsum lorem ipsum...

```
1. Many, many, [many options](https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/all-formats.html) here

:::

:::

### Elaborate [YAML]{.ranchers2} 

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
When you are more demanding regarding rendered document spex, you will have more `keys` and `values` within your [YAML]{.ranchers2} (also indenting for nested/sub--keys)
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

````{r}
---
title             : "The title"
shorttitle        : "Title"

author: 
  - name          : "First Author"
    affiliation   : "1"
    corresponding : yes    # Define only one corresponding author
    address       : "Postal address"
    email         : "my@email.com"
    role: # Contributorship roles (e.g., CRediT, https://credit.niso.org/)
      - "Conceptualization"
      - "Writing - Original Draft Preparation"
      - "Writing - Review & Editing"
  - name          : "Ernst-August Doelle"
    affiliation   : "1,2"
    role:
      - "Writing - Review & Editing"
      - "Supervision"

affiliation:
  - id            : "1"
    institution   : "Wilhelm-Wundt-University"
  - id            : "2"
    institution   : "Konstanz Business School"

authornote: |
  Add complete departmental affiliations for each author here. Each new line herein must be indented, like this line.

  Enter author note here.

abstract: |
  One or two sentences providing a **basic introduction** to the field,  comprehensible to a scientist in any discipline.
  Two to three sentences of **more detailed background**, comprehensible  to scientists in related disciplines.
  One sentence clearly stating the **general problem** being addressed by  this particular study.
  One sentence summarizing the main result (with the words "**here we show**" or their equivalent).
  Two or three sentences explaining what the **main result** reveals in direct comparison to what was thought to be the case previously, or how the  main result adds to previous knowledge.
  One or two sentences to put the results into a more **general context**.
  Two or three sentences to provide a **broader perspective**, readily comprehensible to a scientist in any discipline.
  
  <!-- https://tinyurl.com/ybremelq -->
  
keywords          : "keywords"
wordcount         : "X"

bibliography      : "r-references.bib"

floatsintext      : no
linenumbers       : yes
draft             : no
mask              : no

figurelist        : no
tablelist         : no
footnotelist      : no

classoption       : "man"
output            : papaja::apa6_pdf
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
library("papaja")
r_refs("r-references.bib")
```

```{r analysis-preferences}
# Seed for random number generation
set.seed(42)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache.extra = knitr::rand_seed)
```



# Methods
We report how we determined our sample size, all data exclusions (if any), all manipulations, and all measures in the study. <!-- 21-word solution (Simmons, Nelson & Simonsohn, 2012; retrieved from http://ssrn.com/abstract=2160588) -->

## Participants

## Material

## Procedure

## Data analysis
We used `r cite_r("r-references.bib")` for all our analyses.


# Results

# Discussion


\newpage

# References

::: {#refs custom-style="Bibliography"}
:::

````


:::

:::

### {{< iconify emojione-v1:exclamation-question-mark >}}

...and of course the greatest discovery of them all!!!

[OCTOTHORPES!!!]{.huge}

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/017/178/020/non_2x/red-hashtag-sign-symbol-on-transparent-background-free-png.png){.absolute height="250" left="350" bottom="0"}

![](https://freepngimg.com/save/67579-icons-media-hashtag-number-sign-computer-social/894x981){.absolute height="200" right="-160" bottom="250"}

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/027/391/953/non_2x/hashtag-symbol-isolated-on-a-transparent-background-free-png.png){.absolute height="300" left="-170" bottom="-20"}

![](https://www.clker.com/cliparts/l/D/c/H/2/1/hash-sign-hi.png){.absolute height="150" left="170" bottom="40"}

![](https://png.pngtree.com/png-vector/20250128/ourmid/pngtree-hashtag-3d-icon-isolated-on-a-transparent-background-symbolizing-trends-and-png-image_15359183.png){.absolute height="250" right="190" bottom="-10"}

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/thumbnails/060/686/120/small/signature-nordic-flat-black-hashtag-symbol-crisp-edges-clean-lines-with-scalable-design-ultra-hd-png.png){.absolute height="170" right="10" bottom="70"}

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/thumbnails/061/854/657/small/hashtag-grid-twist-png.png){.absolute height="150" left="-150" top="300"}

:::

![](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/0/00/Popeye_the_Sailor.png){.absolute left="-160" top="-10" height="300"}

![](https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/5e951658-22c3-4cd5-b9d4-004e54adf055/dg3drcp-14a084bd-9fb1-4411-b476-a30812296f3b.png?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..yV_DBuuAw3ZhGXpKj9S8EBitwuFtyatrer04FEzW1zY){.absolute right="-160" top="0" height="200"}

# Today...

![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExYzhtMGZ3eWJtZGRkNHd6aWJrOTZ2bWYwcWJ1dnE1YzRpbWd4eTZ1ayZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/13v7PUKv5zwwhi/giphy.gif)

## [[Zotero!!]{.zotero .Bigger}](https://www.zotero.org/styles) {background-image="https://www.zorro.com/wp-content/uploads/2014/04/zr_teaser_001_040_lr_0001_a001-web.jpg" background-opacity=".4"}

Very popular ([free](https://www.zotero.org/)) [citation](https://quarto.org/docs/authoring/citations.html) "manager" <br> Kulas mostly uses the [style repository](https://www.zotero.org/styles)

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

+ open--source with [many features](https://www.zotero.org/why) 
+ [user forums](https://forums.zotero.org/) seem active
+ [{{< iconify devicon:rstudio >}} integration](https://quarto.org/docs/visual-editor/technical.html#citations) with visual editor

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

+ [local](https://www.zotero.org/download/) or [online](https://www.zotero.org/user/login) options (can sign--in, don't [need]{.underline} to)
  + browser extensions ([{{< iconify devicon:safari >}} {{< iconify devicon:safari >}} {{< iconify logos:firefox >}} {{< iconify logos:microsoft-edge >}}](https://www.zotero.org/download/connectors))
+ Zotero 8 just released (end of January)

:::

:::

![](https://static.vecteezy.com/system/resources/previews/046/032/545/non_2x/illustration-on-a-transparent-background-cartoon-fox-little-fox-running-fox-free-png.png){.absolute bottom="0" left="-150" height="200"}

![](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExaTVmM3NnMGx6aTg3dWF4eW90dG5xb25zN2FvaTlxbDJsdGx4YWZyMCZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/v8pACm7D82olW/giphy.gif){.absolute right="-70" top="20" height="300"}

## {{< iconify devicon:r size=2x >}} Session Info (`r format(Sys.Date(),"%B %d, %Y")`) Rendering: 
```{r}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
sessionInfo()
```

## Notes...

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}

>`typst` document types have traditionally used a different citation processor than html/pdfs, so you may need an additional specification to have the desired [style]{.dancing .underline} effect: {{< iconify emojione-v1:eyes flip=horizontal >}}

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}

<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>
<br>

```{r}
#| code-line-numbers: "5"
---
title: "My Document"
format:
  typst:
    citeproc: true               #<1> 
    csl: apa.csl                 #<1>
bibliography: references.bib
---
```
1. Has been historically effective -- forcing the "normal" Pandoc citation processor
:::

:::

![](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExZm9nbng5eGYwdjF4enN0MTFlY2JsbWYxMW13N2I4djd2Y2pieHFjNiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/l4pTqyJ8XMhLZ3ScE/giphy.gif){.absolute right="0" top="-40" height="450"}
